summary: The main effects of anodontia are seen primarily in the maxilla with reduced development noted especially at sites typically occupied by tooth roots such as the maxillary sinuses; however, significant variability exists among individuals regarding specific skeletal regions most affected. Agent1 concludes based largely on statistical tendencies indicated predominantly through research findings focusing heavily on upper jaws over lower when examining overall impact patterns associated
